sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Prospect Capital Corp stock faces ongoing challenges amid business development company sector pressu
feed.summary: Prospect Capital Corp (PSEC), a business development company, is facing challenges related to high leverage, dividend sustainability, and portfolio credit risks despite a stabilizing interest rate environment in early 2026. The stock trades at a discount to its Net Asset Value (NAV) due to these issues and persistent underperformance. US investors are advised to monitor for potential NAV recovery and distribution adjustments, as the company's scale and high-yield dividend still offer defensive income potential within the BDC sector.

feed.title: Uber Technologies, Inc. Enters Exclusive Multi-Year Digital Promotions Agreement With Ibotta, Inc
feed.summary: Uber Technologies, Inc. has partnered with Ibotta, Inc. for an exclusive, multi-year digital promotions agreement. This collaboration will allow Ibotta-powered digital promotions to be deployed across Uber's grocery and retail ecosystem in the U.S., starting with the Uber Eats app and expanding to other Uber and Postmates apps later. The partnership aims to provide CPG brands with a direct path to consumers at the point of purchase and offer Uber users promotions on everyday grocery and retail items.

feed.title: All-Inclusive Experience by MGM Resorts Debuts on the Las Vegas Strip
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has launched a new all-inclusive experience on the Las Vegas Strip, bundling hotel accommodations, dining, entertainment, and parking into one price. Starting at $330 plus tax for a two-night stay for two guests, the package is available at Luxor Hotel & Casino and Excalibur Hotel & Casino. This offering aims to provide a seamless and stress-free getaway with dynamic pricing and no blackout dates, catering to families, couples, and friends seeking convenience and value.

feed.title: Sarepta's big bet on Arrowhead's siRNA assets yields early data
feed.summary: Sarepta Therapeutics has released initial clinical data for two siRNA candidates, SRP-1001 for FSHD1 and SRP-1003 for DM1, acquired from Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals. The data from single-dose phase 1/2 trials suggest the technology effectively delivers the construct into muscle and has shown promising suppression of target genes. These early results are critical for Sarepta, as analysts view the siRNA programs as vital to the company's future amidst challenges to its core business.

feed.title: Stellantis is stronger after ‘year of reckoning,’ Chairman Elkann says
feed.summary: Stellantis Chairman John Elkann stated the automaker is on stronger footing after a "year of reckoning" in which it focused on improving products and cutting costs. The company is enhancing quality, offering more hybrid models, and repairing dealer ties after recording significant charges related to electric vehicle bets. Elkann expressed confidence in Stellantis's recovery and detailed strategic changes for Exor NV, the investment firm controlling Stellantis, including simplifying its portfolio and increasing its cash pool for acquisitions.

feed.title: Dr Pepper Snapple Group ISIN US49271V1008: Issuer Profile and Keurig Dr Pepper Product Portfolio Ove
feed.summary: This article provides an issuer profile for Dr Pepper Snapple Group ISIN US49271V1008, now part of Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ: KDP). It details KDP's extensive product portfolio, operational strategies, and investor context, highlighting its stable position in the North American beverage market with no immediate major product catalysts as of March 25, 2026. The article explains how the legacy ISIN relates to the current KDP entity and its diverse offerings across soft drinks, juices, and coffee, emphasizing its defensive qualities for investors.

feed.title: Oil Services Giant SLB Teams Up with Nvidia to Build AI Systems for Energy Companies
feed.summary: SLB, a major oilfield services company, is expanding its partnership with tech giant Nvidia to develop AI infrastructure and specialized models for the energy sector. This collaboration will focus on creating modular AI data centers and an "AI Factory for Energy" to help oil, gas, and power companies analyze vast amounts of operational data. The initiative aims to enhance efficiency, reduce costs, and accelerate sustainable energy systems amidst the energy industry's growing need for advanced technological solutions.

feed.title: Why Raymond James Is Calling for a $290 Price Tag on Valero (VLO)
feed.summary: Raymond James has increased its price target for Valero Energy (VLO) to $290 from $215, maintaining a Strong Buy rating. This bullish outlook is driven by Valero's strong Q4 2025 earnings, elevated refining margins, its structural advantage in processing discounted heavy crude, and consistent operational efficiency. The firm projects continued earnings expansion beyond current geopolitical influences, supported by dividend growth and an optimization project slated for H2 2026.

feed.title: Sportsman's Warehouse stock faces retail sector headwinds amid shifting consumer spending patterns i
feed.summary: Sportsman's Warehouse (ISIN: US85200M1027) stock is contending with challenges in the specialty retail sector for outdoor gear, driven by fluctuating consumer spending, inflationary pressures, and high interest rates. The company is focusing on store optimization, digital expansion, and unique in-store experiences to maintain customer loyalty and operational strength. Investors are advised to monitor inventory management, e-commerce adaptation, and potential regulatory changes affecting firearms sales, while considering the stock's niche positioning and resilience in the outdoor recreation economy.

feed.title: PayPal Stock Analysis: How Venmo and Margin Discipline Could Support a $58 Target
feed.summary: PayPal's stock has faced recent pressure due to slowing revenue growth, competition from Apple Pay, and legal concerns, leading to its removal from the S&P 100 index. Despite these challenges, a valuation model suggests a target price of $58, implying a 31.8% total return based on modest revenue growth, stable margins, and an 8x P/E multiple. The key for investors is whether PayPal can stabilize its core checkout business and reaccelerate growth through initiatives like Venmo monetization while maintaining strong operating efficiency.

feed.title: Banco Santander SA (ADR) stock faces pressure amid European banking sector volatility and shifting interest rate expectations
feed.summary: Banco Santander SA (ADR) is navigating challenges from slowing loan growth and regulatory scrutiny in European markets, while US investors are looking at its Latin American exposure and digital banking push as potential growth drivers. The company's robust deposit growth provides stability, but the European Central Bank's policy stance and potential margin compression pose headwinds. Despite these pressures, Santander's strong capital position and diversification make it an interesting watch for US investors.

feed.title: Wynn Resorts Ltd stock faces institutional selling pressure amid mixed analyst outlook and Macau recovery signals
feed.summary: Wynn Resorts Ltd (NASDAQ:WYNN) is experiencing institutional selling pressure, with firms like Davenport & Co and Invesco S&P 500 Index Fund reducing their positions, despite a "Moderate Buy" analyst consensus and significant upside potential. The company's stock shows strong year-to-date performance, driven by robust Las Vegas operations that offset some risks associated with its Macau properties. Investors are weighing the stock's valuation, growth prospects, and exposure to both domestic strength and international volatility.

feed.title: Paychex Inc (NASDAQ:PAYX) Shares Surge on Strong Earnings Beat Despite Revenue Miss
feed.summary: Paychex Inc (NASDAQ:PAYX) reported mixed financial results for its fiscal third quarter, with revenue slightly missing analyst expectations at $1.81 billion, but adjusted earnings per share exceeding estimates at $1.71. Despite the revenue miss, the company's shares surged by approximately 4.7% in pre-market trading, driven by strong profitability, strategic growth initiatives including the Paycor HCM acquisition, and an optimistic future outlook. Paychex also demonstrated strong financial health, generating $2.0 billion in cash flow from operations and returning $1.5 billion to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases.

feed.title: AES Announces Extension of Consent Solicitation for its 2028 Notes and Expiration of Consent Solicitations for its 2030 Notes and 2031 Notes
feed.summary: The AES Corporation announced an extension of the consent solicitation for its 5.450% Senior Notes due 2028 until March 27, 2026, aiming to secure majority consent for proposed amendments. Concurrently, the company terminated consent solicitations for its 3.950% Senior Notes due 2030 and 2.450% Senior Notes due 2031, having not received the required consents by the March 24, 2026 deadline. No consideration will be paid to holders of the 2030 and 2031 notes who previously submitted consents.

feed.title: Tantech Holdings Ltd (NASDAQ: TANH) launches $2.15M ATM with 4.5% fee
feed.summary: Tantech Holdings Ltd (NASDAQ: TANH) has launched an At-The-Market (ATM) offering for up to $2.15 million in Class A Common Shares through Joseph Stone Capital LLC, with a 4.5% sales commission. The proceeds are intended for working capital and general corporate purposes. The offering highlights inherent risks related to Tantech's operational base in China, including regulatory and geopolitical uncertainties that could affect its ability to conduct business and offer securities.

feed.title: AbbVie Inc stock faces renewed scrutiny as Mercy Investment files shareholder proposal amid pipeline and patent pressures
feed.summary: Mercy Investment has filed a shareholder proposal with AbbVie Inc., urging the pharmaceutical giant to enhance its focus on pipeline sustainability and capital allocation amidst patent battles and market dynamics for its immunology and oncology portfolios. This move is particularly relevant for US investors, as it signals potential governance shifts impacting the company's core successor drugs to Humira. AbbVie's pipeline execution risks and its defensive dividend profile are highlighted as key considerations for investors in the volatile biotech landscape.

feed.title: Sequans Communications (SQNS) director details warrant holdings in Form 3
feed.summary: Sequans Communications director Hubert de Pesquidoux filed an initial Form 3, disclosing his derivative holdings in company securities. The filing details multiple series of warrants on ordinary shares with varying exercise prices and expiration dates, and notes that each American Depositary Share represents 100 ordinary shares. This Form 3 establishes his starting warrant position as a company director.

feed.title: Generation Income Properties Ends Strategic Alternatives Review, Will Remain Independent and Focus on Portfolio Management
feed.summary: Generation Income Properties, Inc. (NASDAQ: GIPR) announced the conclusion of its strategic alternatives review, deciding to remain an independent, publicly traded entity. The Special Committee, initially formed to evaluate options including sale or merger, was dissolved after determining that focusing on disciplined portfolio management and addressing upcoming debt and preferred equity maturities is currently in the best interest of shareholders. The company will continue its engagement with Cantor Fitzgerald & Co. as financial advisor and remains open to future strategic opportunities.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Says the Pullback in Jacobs Solutions Makes No Sense to Him
feed.summary: Jim Cramer expressed bewilderment at the recent 2% year-to-date decline in Jacobs Solutions (NYSE: J) stock, despite the company reporting "beat and raise" quarters. He highlighted the company's strong engineering construction firm with significant data center exposure. Cramer also recalled a past instance where he strongly recommended Jacobs Solutions at $132, rebutting an analyst's incorrect valuation.

feed.title: PayPal adds former Block exec, Alyssa Henry, to board (PYPL:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: PayPal Holdings (PYPL) has appointed Alyssa Henry, the former CEO of Block's Square business, to its board of directors. This appointment follows the decision of another director not to seek re-election. Henry brings over three decades of experience in scaling businesses to PayPal's board.

feed.title: First Bank ranked #14 among US public banks by S&P Global Market Intelligence
feed.summary: First Bank (NASDAQ: FBNC) has been ranked #14 among U.S. public banks with over $10 billion in assets by S&P Global Market Intelligence, based on its 2025 financial performance. This ranking highlights the bank's strong growth, profitability, and sound financial management. CEO Richard Moore emphasized that this achievement reflects their disciplined approach and the strength of their team and client trust.

feed.title: Does FedEx’s AI‑Orchestrated Same‑Day Local Push Reframe the Network 2.0 Story for FDX?
feed.summary: FedEx recently launched FedEx SameDay Local, leveraging AI and a national network of local providers to offer two-hour and end-of-day deliveries. This initiative aims to deepen FedEx's presence in last-mile logistics and aligns with its Network 2.0 strategy, focusing on efficiency and value. While it reinforces the long-term vision, the company still faces near-term challenges like industrial softness and potential margin pressures from rising labor and environmental costs.

feed.title: Should Equinix’s (EQIX) New Distributed AI Hub Reshape How Investors View Its Data Center Strategy?
feed.summary: Equinix recently launched its Distributed AI Hub, a vendor-neutral platform designed to unify connectivity, security, and governance for distributed AI workloads across its global network of 280 data centers. While this initiative strengthens Equinix's investment narrative around interconnection and AI, it doesn't significantly alter short-term catalysts related to its "Build Bolder" expansion plan or mitigate risks associated with high investment and debt levels if demand or pricing soften. The Hub aims to boost adoption of high-margin interconnection services like Equinix Fabric and Network Edge, but investors should be mindful of potential shifts towards more power-efficient, on-premises AI infrastructure.

feed.title: Citizens Financial : Advises Ramp Health on its Acquisition by Vitality Group
feed.summary: Citizens Capital Markets & Advisory served as the exclusive financial advisor to Ramp Health on its acquisition by Vitality Group, a subsidiary of Discovery Limited. Ramp Health provides technology-enabled health and safety risk mitigation solutions. This acquisition will expand Ramp Health's services globally through Vitality's brand and enhance Vitality's capabilities in occupational health and safety.

feed.title: Alteogen licenses drug delivery tech to Biogen for $579 million
feed.summary: Alteogen Inc. has licensed its ALT-B4 drug delivery technology to Biogen Inc. for the development and commercialization of subcutaneous formulations of biologics. Under the agreement, Alteogen will receive an upfront payment of $20 million, with potential milestone payments up to $549 million, and royalties on net sales. This deal follows a similar recent agreement with Tesaro, a GSK subsidiary, underscoring Alteogen's position in the biotechnology industry.

feed.title: Six Flags names Richard Haddrill as executive chairman
feed.summary: Six Flags Entertainment Corporation has appointed Richard Haddrill as its executive chairman, effective immediately, alongside Marilyn Spiegel as Lead Independent Director. Haddrill, known for leading Bally Technologies and other companies to significant growth, joins Six Flags amidst a leadership overhaul and financial challenges. The company, facing a 54% stock decline over the past year despite a recent recovery, aims to leverage Haddrill's expertise to improve its financial position and strategic direction.

feed.title: CoStar Stock at $41: Here’s Why Numbers Point to 150% Bull Case
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) stock is trading near its 52-week low despite 59 consecutive quarters of double-digit revenue growth and strong performance from its Homes.com platform. Analysts see significant upside, with a mean target of $64.89, and TIKR's model projects a 150% total return to $103.65 by 2030, driven by expanding free cash flow and Homes.com subscriber growth. The company's $1.5 billion share repurchase program and confirmed residential profitability in 2026 further support a bullish outlook, though Homes.com subscriber growth remains a key variable to monitor.

feed.title: MGM RESORTS INTERNATIONAL LAUNCHES ALL-INCLUSIVE EXPERIENCE ON LAS VEGAS STRIP
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International is launching an all-inclusive experience on the Las Vegas Strip at Luxor Hotel & Casino and Excalibur Hotel & Casino, starting at $330 plus tax for a two-night stay for two guests. This new bundle combines hotel accommodations, daily resort fees, dining, entertainment, and parking into a single upfront price, aiming to offer guests a convenient and hassle-free way to enjoy a Las Vegas vacation. Bookings are available now for stays beginning April 6th, with dynamic pricing and no blackout dates, allowing for broad accessibility throughout the year.

feed.title: Safe Pro Group appoints ex-Anduril director to advisory board
feed.summary: Safe Pro Group Inc. has appointed Brian Mack, a former Senior Business Development Director at Anduril Industries and retired U.S. Army officer, to its Strategic Advisory Board. Mack brings over 20 years of experience in defense, government, and technology sectors, and was instrumental in securing a $100 million U.S. Army contract for Anduril. Safe Pro Group specializes in AI-enabled defense, security, and situational awareness solutions, with recent achievements including a $1 million U.S. Government award and participation in U.S. Army exercises for its AI Edge processing computer vision solutions.

feed.title: Spruce Point Capital Management Announces Investment Opinion: Releases Report and Strong Sell Research Opinion on Bunge Global, SA (NYSE: BG)
feed.summary: Spruce Point Capital Management has issued a "Strong Sell" research opinion on Bunge Global SA (NYSE: BG), citing significant downside risk of 55%-80%. The report claims Bunge is a "non-economic agribusiness roll-up" with a substantial capital deficit, facing core challenges in its oilseeds business and having wildly missed EBITDA projections post-Viterra acquisition. Spruce Point believes Bunge's financial leverage is much higher than reported and criticizes the Viterra deal as disappointing and potentially mismanaged.

feed.title: U.S. bank to launch India GCC with major Chennai office lease
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp is entering India by establishing a Global Capability Center (GCC) in Chennai, leasing over 650,000 sq ft of office space. This move, supported by a build-operate-transfer model with Cognizant, aims to bolster its technology, analytics, and back-office operations and involves plans to hire 3,000 to 5,000 employees over the next five years. The expansion highlights India's growing importance as a hub for global financial institutions seeking cost efficiencies and a skilled workforce.

feed.title: [ARS] TACTILE SYSTEMS TECHNOLOGY INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by TACTILE SYSTEMS TECHNOLOGY INC (TCMD) on March 25, 2026. The filing has a low impact and neutral sentiment. It provides recent news and other SEC filings related to Tactile Medical.

feed.title: Project Spotlight: UA Local 464 and UA Local 16 delivered the processed piping at Costco’s chicken processing plant in Omaha — a major facility supplying a significant share of Costco’s rotisserie chicken nationwide. Proven union skill on large-scale projects
feed.summary: UA Local 464 and UA Local 16 successfully handled the processed piping for Costco's sizable chicken processing plant in Omaha. This facility is crucial for supplying a significant portion of Costco's nationwide rotisserie chicken demand. The project highlights the proven expertise of union workers in managing large-scale operations.

feed.title: So-Young International (NASDAQ:SY) Announces Earnings Results, Beats Expectations By $0.53 EPS
feed.summary: So-Young International (NASDAQ:SY) announced its quarterly earnings, reporting an EPS of ($0.15), significantly beating the consensus estimate of ($0.68) by $0.53. Despite the EPS beat, the company's revenue of $65.85 million fell considerably short of the estimated $442.62 million, and it posted negative net margins and return on equity. Institutional investors have shown increased interest, with several hedge funds boosting their holdings, and analysts currently have a "Hold" rating with a target price of $5.50.

feed.title: Pet Partners and the Baxter Foundation Expand Therapy Animal Programs to Support 100,000 Patients and Healthcare Workers in Two-Year Pilot
feed.summary: Pet Partners and the Baxter Foundation have partnered to launch a two-year pilot program expanding therapy animal access in healthcare settings. This initiative aims to reach 100,000 patients and healthcare workers in regions like Northern California, Upstate New York, and Greater Chicago, IL. The partnership will focus on increasing therapy animal visits, enhancing volunteer training, and conducting research on the impact of therapy animals to strengthen healthcare resilience and provide comfort.

feed.title: T. ROWE PRICE EXPLORES LEADERSHIP, TRANSFORMATION, AND THE FUTURE OF MOBILITY WITH FORD CEO JIM FARLEY
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price's podcast "The Angle" features an interview with Ford CEO Jim Farley, where they discuss leadership, strategic reinvention, and the realities of electrification in the automotive industry. Farley shares insights from his career and experience leading Ford through significant industry changes. This episode is part of a series focusing on C-suite leaders navigating financial markets and evolving industries.

feed.title: Ranchland outsources fund operations to SEI for growth
feed.summary: SEI (NASDAQ: SEIC) announced that Ranchland Capital Partners has selected SEI to provide outsourced fund administration and investor services for its alternative fund offerings. This partnership aims to support Ranchland's accelerated growth by leveraging SEI's operational capabilities, technology, and controls. The collaboration will allow Ranchland to focus on investment execution, distribution, and client relationships across its ranchland real-asset strategies, benefiting from SEI's scalable infrastructure and enhanced transparency.

feed.title: 570 judges pick 353 real estate projects shaping 129 markets
feed.summary: CoStar Group announced the winners of its fifth annual CoStar Impact Awards, recognizing 353 commercial real estate projects and transactions from 2025 across 129 global markets. These awards highlight projects that have significantly influenced their respective neighborhoods through their vibrancy, economic activity, growth, diversification, and innovation. Notable winners include JPMorgan Chase's new global headquarters in New York City, Champlain condo rentals in Montreal, and Anduril Industries' "Arsenal-1" manufacturing campus in Columbus, Ohio.

feed.title: CoStar Group Announces Winners of Fifth Annual CoStar Impact Awards
feed.summary: CoStar Group announced the winners of its fifth annual CoStar Impact Awards, recognizing 353 commercial real estate projects and transactions across 129 global markets that significantly impacted their communities in 2025. Honorees include JPMorgan Chase's new global headquarters in NYC, Champlain condo rentals in Montreal, and Anduril Industries' "Arsenal-1" manufacturing campus in Columbus, Ohio. These awards highlight leadership and lasting value brought to communities through innovative development and transformative investments.

feed.title: Why Riverview took an $11.4M hit to lift margin and earnings
feed.summary: Riverview Bancorp (NASDAQ: RVSB) has executed a strategic balance sheet optimization on March 25, 2026, selling $149.3 million of lower-yielding investment securities and realizing an estimated pre-tax loss of $11.4 million. The company expects this move to add approximately 25 basis points to its net interest margin and about $0.13 to its annual EPS once fully realized, with an earn-back period of less than 3.5 years. Riverview remains well-capitalized and stated no additional capital was required for this optimization.

feed.title: Pet Partners and the Baxter Foundation Expand Therapy Animal Programs to Support 100,000 Patients and Healthcare Workers in Two-Year Pilot
feed.summary: Pet Partners and the Baxter Foundation have launched a two-year pilot program to expand therapy animal programs in healthcare settings. This initiative aims to reach 100,000 patients and healthcare workers in key regions, providing comfort and reducing stress. The partnership will focus on increasing access to therapy animals, advancing animal-assisted interventions through training, strengthening industry research on the impact of therapy animals, and engaging Baxter employees in volunteering efforts.

feed.title: Contact Levi & Korsinsky by April 6, 2026 Deadline to Join Class Action Against Oracle Corporation(ORCL)
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has announced a class action securities lawsuit against Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL). Investors who suffered losses between June 12, 2025, and December 16, 2025, are encouraged to join by the April 6, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline. The lawsuit alleges that Oracle made false statements regarding its AI infrastructure strategy, leading to massive capital expenditures without equivalent revenue growth and creating risks concerning debt, credit rating, and free cash flow.

feed.title: ICE First Look at Mortgage Performance: Prepayments Rise on Recent Refinance Activity and Serious Delinquencies Increase as Cure Rates Slow
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) reported a rebound in mortgage prepayment activity in February 2026, driven by recent refinance waves, with speeds up 14% month-over-month. Concurrently, the national delinquency rate edged higher due to seasonal increases in early-stage delinquencies and a notable rise in seriously past-due loans, although overall delinquency rates remain below pre-pandemic levels. The increase in seriously delinquent loans is primarily attributed to a slowdown in cure rates rather than a spike in new defaults, with FHA loans accounting for a significant portion of this rise.

feed.title: GE HealthCare to showcase comprehensive cardiology portfolio at ACC.26, including its latest AI-enabled imaging technologies, advanced software solutions, and key collaborations
feed.summary: GE HealthCare is set to showcase its comprehensive cardiology portfolio at ACC.26, highlighting AI-enabled imaging, advanced software solutions, and key collaborations. The company will feature its newly FDA-cleared Photonova Spectra photon-counting CT system, the ReadyFix fleet management solution for MAC VU360 ECG workstations, and a new partnership with Gentuity to enhance interventional cardiology. These innovations aim to improve precision care, operational efficiency, and diagnostic confidence for clinicians addressing cardiovascular disease.

feed.title: Synchrony and Figo Pet Insurance Partner to Streamline Claims Reimbursement for Pet Owners Through CareCredit
feed.summary: Synchrony and Figo Pet Insurance have formed a partnership to simplify claims reimbursement for pet owners using CareCredit. This collaboration allows approved Figo pet insurance claims to be directly credited to a customer's CareCredit account after they pay for veterinary services with their CareCredit card. This initiative aims to reduce financial stress for pet owners, streamline the reimbursement process, and benefit veterinary practices by expanding the accessibility of CareCredit.

feed.title: SK Hynix Stock Will List in the US. What It Means for Micron.
feed.summary: SK Hynix stock is set to list in the U.S., offering investors a new option in the memory-chip market. This move could provide an alternative to Micron Technology for those interested in high-bandwidth memory for AI processors. Both companies are prominent players in this rapidly growing sector.

feed.title: IURC investigates why energy bills are so high
feed.summary: The Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission (IURC) is investigating the high energy bills from CenterPoint Energy, Duke Energy, and three other utility companies. The companies cited rising construction/operating costs and intense weather as reasons for the increased expenses. Representative Alex Burton emphasized the need to invest in cheaper energy forms to lower monthly bills, and both Duke and CenterPoint have started efforts toward bill transparency.

feed.title: SLB expands Nvidia partnership to develop AI infrastructure for energy sector
feed.summary: Oilfield services company SLB is expanding its partnership with Nvidia to develop AI infrastructure and models specifically for the energy sector. This collaboration will see SLB become a design partner for modular AI data centers powered by Nvidia technology and work with the chip firm to create an "AI Factory for Energy," aimed at helping oil and gas producers and power companies leverage AI for operational data. The initiative addresses the energy industry's growing need to process vast amounts of data efficiently, cut costs, improve reliability, and lower emissions, especially as drilling demand slows.

feed.title: NYSE gives American Water the Closing Bell for its 140th anniversary
feed.summary: American Water (NYSE: AWK) is celebrating its 140th anniversary with its COO, Cheryl Norton, participating in NYSE programming, including the Closing Bell. The NYSE's daily update on March 25, 2026, also features the Opening Bell rung by Michael and Susan Dell with Invest America, discussing Treasury-backed investment accounts for children. Additionally, Verily Health CEO Stephen Gillett will discuss a recent $300 million investment round and its precision health AI strategy.

feed.title: Illinois Tool Works stock faces scrutiny amid industrial slowdown signals and margin pressures in Q1
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) stock is under scrutiny due to weakening demand in key segments, with the US manufacturing PMI dipping below 50. The upcoming Q1 earnings report on April 29 will be crucial for investors to assess order backlogs, pricing power, and cost controls amid an uneven industrial recovery. Despite strong operational margins and financial health, ITW faces challenges from automotive production cuts and potential input cost inflation, making its diversified portfolio and defensive segments key to its performance.
